aspects.description: Users would comment on how easy or difficult it is to operate the syringe lever, including the smoothness of the lever and clutch mechanism.
Users would comment on the device's physical condition over time, including signs of wear, damage, or corrosion.
Users would comment on the ease, clarity, and effectiveness of cleaning, disinfecting, and sterilizing the device.
Users would comment on how well the device works with the specified 20 mL syringes it is designed to hold.
Users would comment on the convenience and practicality of storing and handling the device between uses.
Users would comment on the device’s effectiveness and reliability in delivering fluids accurately during procedures.
